title: Health Science and Research - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Science and Research
Health Canada depends on a strong foundation of science and research to fulfill its mission to help Canadians maintain and improve their health.
- About Science & Research
- Science Advice & Decision Making
- Reports & Publications

## Science and Research at Work for You
Scientific expertise contributes to decisions about health standards, health policy, regulations and health programs. It also allows Health Canada to:
Get recalls and safety alerts
Research Ethics Board
Science of health blog
Contact Science and Research Resources
- Anticipate and respond to health risks posed by diseases, environmental hazards, food and other threats;
- Verify that the drugs, food, medical devices and other therapeutic products available to Canadians are safe and effective; and
- Provide information to Canadians to help them make informed decisions about their health.
